name: agent-guards
description: Runnable skills that return an exit code you can enforce — token budget audits, hallucination triage, cross-surface open-loop tracking, and a personal subscription auditor. Real tools, not prompt wrappers.

plugins.name: agent-guards
plugins.description: Four runnable skills that hold a line with an exit code: context-budget (audit per-turn token cost, fail CI when the agent gets fatter), claim-audit (separate grounded/hedged/bare factual claims to catch likely hallucinations), open-loops (extract unresolved commitments, deferrals, and open questions from a transcript so cron/triggers don't lose thread context), and subscription-audit (find the recurring charges hiding in a bank/card CSV, report true monthly/yearly cost, flag the forgotten ones worth cancelling). Dependency-light Python, exit-code gates, not prompt wrappers.
